examples: Mimi and her family went off to Tunisia to rejoin her father.
My cat Mimi loves to be clean.
Mimi had got over her pique at Susan's refusal to accept the job.
After all, with grandkids named Madison, Tyler and Haley, why shouldn't grandmothers go by Mimi.
Commentator Rebekah Sanderlin has observed that the "me generation" has become the "Mimi(ph)" generation.
